case_title: LEWIS, ANTHONY et al vs. RAMSEY, GITHAIGA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER BY COURT DENYING PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION AS UNTIMELY AND STATING THAT NO FINDING WAS MADE BY COURT THAT AGREEMENT WAS OR IS A LEASE AGREEMENT RATHER THAN A MONTH-TO-MONTH AGREEMENT FILED AND MAILED TO ALL PARTIES WITH CLERK'S CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL.

ORDER OF COURT CLARIFYING JUDGMENT OF 1-26-96 AND ORDERING RENT PAID DIRECTLY TO PLAINTIFF ANTHONY LEWIS, ORDER DENYING PLTF'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, ORDER DENYING PLTF'S MOTION FOR COSTS FILED AND MAILED TO ALL PARTIES WITH CLERK'S CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL.

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT ORDERED HEARING RE PLTFS' RENEWED REQUEST FOR JUDGMNT IN FAVOR OF PLTFS DUE TO DEFT'S ALLEDGED NON-COMPL WITH COURT ORDER. PLTFS DR. ROSE LEWIS & ANTHONY LEWIS ARE PRESENT. ATNY STEVEN MORGER PRESENT FOR DEFT. COURT HEARS ARGUMENT BY PARTIES AND ORDERS THAT DEFT PAY TO PLTFS THE AMOUNT OF $6450.00 BY CERTIFIED CHECK. CASHIER'S CHECK IN AMOUNT OF $6450.00 IS PRESENTED TO PLTFS IN OPEN COURT. DEFT GITHAIGA RAMSEY IS NOW PRESENT. COURT ORDERS ACCEPTANCE OF CHECK BY PLTFS AS FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AND AMD JUDGMNT, AND ORDERS THAT NO FURTHER COURT PROCEEDINGS SHALL TAKE PLACE ON THIS ACTION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT RAMSEY, GITHAIGA JUDMNT FOR DEFT FOR POSSESSION OF 738 HAIGHT ST, SF, ON CONDITION DEFT PAY SUM OF $2800.00 TO PLTF ON/BEFORE 2/5/96 PLUS PAY FEB 1996 RENT AT SAME TIME OR EARLIER. IF SUMS NOT PAID, JUDMNT WILL BE FOR PLTFS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS. RENT TO BE PAID ON FIRST DAY OF MONTH. SEE JDMNT FOR DETAIL.
